name: @thryx/multi-wallet-mcp-server
description: Multi-wallet management for AI agents on Base/EVM. Generate wallet pools (up to 100), check ETH and token balances, distribute ETH across wallets, consolidate funds, scan ERC-20 tokens for rug risk, and monitor gas prices. Private keys are stored server-side and never exposed.
author: Thryx (The Agent Cafe)

tools.name: wallet_generate
tools.description: Generate new EVM wallets (1-100). Returns addresses only — private keys are stored securely server-side and never exposed via MCP.

count.description: Number of wallets to generate (1-100, default 5)

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited access

tools.name: wallet_import
tools.description: Import an existing wallet by private key. The key is stored securely server-side and never returned via MCP tools.

private_key.description: Private key (hex, with or without 0x prefix)

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited access

tools.name: wallet_list
tools.description: List all managed wallets with addresses and labels. No private keys returned.

tools.name: wallet_get_balances
tools.description: Check ETH and all well-known token balances for a single wallet on any supported EVM chain.

tools.name: wallet_get_all_balances
tools.description: Check ETH balances for ALL managed wallets at once. Returns total portfolio value across the entire wallet pool.

tools.name: wallet_distribute_eth
tools.description: Distribute ETH from a source wallet to multiple destination wallets. Supports simulation mode (confirm=false) before execution.

from_address.description: Source wallet address (managed wallet or deployer)

to_addresses.description: Destination addresses. Omit to distribute to ALL managed wallets.

amount_each.description: ETH to send to each wallet (e.g. '0.001')

confirm.description: Must be true to execute. False simulates first.

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited access

tools.name: wallet_consolidate_eth
tools.description: Consolidate ETH from all managed wallets back to a single destination address. Leaves a configurable gas reserve in each wallet.

to_address.description: Destination address to receive consolidated ETH

gas_reserve.description: ETH to leave in each wallet for gas (default: 0.0001)

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited access

tools.name: wallet_scan_token
tools.description: Security scan an ERC-20 token contract. Detects honeypot risk, hidden mint, blacklist, pause, owner permissions, and proxy patterns. Returns rug risk score 0-100.

tools.name: wallet_get_gas
tools.description: Get current gas prices on a chain including gasPrice, maxFeePerGas, maxPriorityFeePerGas, and estimated transfer cost.

tools.name: wallet_get_token_balance
tools.description: Check a specific ERC-20 token balance for a wallet. Supports any token address, not just well-known ones.
